title: ARMA(p,q) Process Generation Flowchart
description: A visual representation of how a Mixed Autoregressive-Moving Average (ARMA) process generates its current value by combining its own past values (AR component) and past shock terms (MA component).
relationships: Past Observations are weighted by AR parameters (φ) and summed
Past Shock Terms are weighted by MA parameters (θ) and summed
The summed AR component and summed MA component are added together with the Current Shock Term to form the output value Y_t
